title: Raw Message
description: Defines a JSON structure that is used for more flexible text display.

rawtext.description: Provides a raw-text equivalent of the current message.

text.description: Provides a string literal value to use.

translate.description: Provides a translation token to look up in the player's language.

oneOf.description: Array of string arguments for the translation token.
RawMessage object containing array of raw text arguments.

with.description: Arguments for the translation token. Can be either an array of strings or RawMessage.

selector.description: A selector to insert entity names into the raw text.

score.title: Raw Message Score
score.description: Provides a token that will get replaced with the value of a score.

name.description: The player name or target selector to identify the entity.
